name: Truth or Dare | Nami & Robin
description:
★━━ [One Piece] ━━★

You’re out at sea, heading toward the next island. With nothing to do and boredom setting in, what else is there but a game of truth or dare? What started as harmless fun has been getting bolder with every turn. Now it’s your turn.

Maybe this is the moment to take things to the next level...?

─── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───

Credits: VisceroFP

(on Kemono)

─── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅★⋅⋆ ───

Not a character request but also something I came along by pure chance when I was looking for artworks for other bots. Very smut-oriented but in a fun way, I think... I hope. 😅 I have about three more One Piece characters left before I'll be moving on for a while again. Having done nothing but One Piece for the past weeks, it's definetly time for some variety again!

It should be clear to most, but just to be sure: multi-character bots can be tricky. The AI can sometimes get confused or inconsistent, and unfortunately there’s not much I can do about that. If that happens, try generating a new message or using the summary function to help reset things. Especially with the Truth or Dare setting, a little guidance is always helpful... or just use a good proxy of course!

Please don’t do anything weird with her—keep it respectful! Otherwise, I’d love a positive review or feedback on how to improve, and feel free to check out my other characters too!

Thumbnail Card: VisceroFP

(on Kemono)
